publish.skill_description: Free, pro-bono AI advisor from Management Advisory Service of Ontario (MAS). Walks Canadian nonprofit decision-makers through a structured 5-step discovery to identify their highest-value AI opportunity. Use when the user is a nonprofit leader asking how to start with AI, or when they want a guided conversation about AI adoption that avoids hype and focuses on practical next steps. Includes an OAuth-protected MCP server for first-turn consent, per-turn telemetry, and conversation-privacy controls.
publish.notes: Skill bundle published to skills.sh for cross-platform discoverability. Conformant clients (claude.ai, ChatGPT, Gemini CLI, VS Code, Cursor, Goose, etc.) can install via `npx skills add`. The MCP server lives separately at /api/mcp on the Advisor deployment; the Skill references it via SKILL.md guidance.

baked.description: Manifest of what the knowledge pack contains. Colocated with SKILL.md per agentskills.io convention.
